# Avinash Sreekumar

> Cross-platform full-stack developer in Trivandrum, India. Ships fintech, web, mobile, and on-device AI products end-to-end. Open to remote contract work.

## About
Avinash "Avi" Sreekumar is an independent full-stack developer with deep experience across React, Node.js, MongoDB, Flutter, and native Android (Kotlin). He specialises in fintech and data-visualisation work, and recently shipped four products solo in six months — including a production stock-portfolio tracker, a Flutter game on the Play Store, and a native Android chat app running Gemma 3n entirely on-device via LiteRT. Previously Lead Web Developer at MeOmics (UK, 2024–2025); MA Digital Media Design from Birkbeck, University of London.

## Projects
- [Stock Portfolio Pro](https://stockportfolio.pro) — production fintech dashboard with hand-rolled D3 charts, real-time market data, Stripe-gated paid features. Node/Express/MongoDB. Public read-only demo at stockportfolio.pro/demo.
- [Localyze](https://avisre.github.io/#work) — native Android chat app running Gemma 3n locally via LiteRT, fully offline. Includes a Playwright eval harness. Currently in Play Store Closed Testing.
- [The Ledger Report](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.anonymous.stocktrackergame) — narrative business-strategy game set in India 1947. Built solo with Flutter and Riverpod. In Play Store production.
- [Praarthana](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.praarthana.prayerapp.avinash) — Android prayer app published to Play Store production, May 2026.

## Skills
JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, D3.js, Flutter, Dart, Kotlin, native Android, Gemma 3n / LiteRT (on-device LLM), Playwright, fintech systems, data visualization.

## Availability
Open to remote contract work as of May 2026. Fintech and data-viz specialism preferred.
